title: Dark mode / different color sceme
excerpt: you have to change the look to have more contrast - I can’t see where the stripe to move the picture right in the document preview, and that’s not the only place where it’s invisible.

posts.author: Yasmin-m (yasmin mazur)
posts.cookedHtml:
בדיקת חומרי גלם - Google Chrome899×929 107 KB

you have to change the look to have more contrast - I can’t see where the stripe to move the picture right in the document preview, and that’s not the only place where it’s invisible.
